scripts.dev-cnc-fluidnc: cross-env VITE_TARGET_ENV=CNC VITE_SUBTARGET_ENV=FluidNC concurrently "npm run server" "vite"
scripts.dev-cnc-grbl: cross-env VITE_TARGET_ENV=CNC VITE_SUBTARGET_ENV=GRBL concurrently "npm run server" "vite"
scripts.cnc-fluidnc: cross-env VITE_TARGET_ENV=CNC VITE_SUBTARGET_ENV=FluidNC VITE_SINGLEFILE=true vite build && npm run gzip
scripts.cnc-fluidnc-split: cross-env VITE_TARGET_ENV=CNC VITE_SUBTARGET_ENV=FluidNC vite build && npm run gzip
scripts.cnc-grbl: cross-env VITE_TARGET_ENV=CNC VITE_SUBTARGET_ENV=GRBL VITE_SINGLEFILE=true vite build && npm run gzip
scripts.cnc-grbl-split: cross-env VITE_TARGET_ENV=CNC VITE_SUBTARGET_ENV=GRBL vite build && npm run gzip
scripts.buildcnc: npm run cnc-fluidnc && npm run cnc-grbl && npm run cnc-grblhal
scripts.buildprinter: npm run printer-marlin && npm run printer-repetier && npm run printer-smoothieware && npm run printer-marlin-embedded
scripts.buildall: npm run buildsand && npm run buildprinter && npm run buildcnc
